commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=775fa0c2852f3de1f089686f8a7282527afd832e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an exported undici socket-error detector, retries `buildGuardedModelFetch` once for `UND_ERR_SOCKET`, adjusts local-service lease cleanup around the retry, and adds detector-only unit tests.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +29. Total +73 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level path: current main routes Anthropic Messages through guarded fetch, rethrows the first pre-response transport failure, and failover classifies fetch/network failures as timeout. I did not live-reproduce the multi-hour stale-socket condition in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or reporter proof plus provider-owner judgment on the intended transient retry scope; automation cannot supply the affected-environment evidence for this external PR.

target.title: fix(anthropic): retry on UND_ERR_SOCKET keep-alive failures (#87407)
target.author: jincheng-xydt
